title.en: The Pathless Tower, in a piece of time and space.

content.en:
The Pathless Tower, in a piece of time and space.

A half-step perfect master of the Extreme Creation Realm has come here, and there are many perfect masters, even if some of the main bodies are not there, they will send an avatar here.

After all, this time it was the Lord of the Third Tower, that is, the Lord of the Ancient of the Daoless Tower.

According to Ye Tian's understanding, the status of the Lord of Time of Tower No. 6 is far inferior to that of the Lord of Canggu.

Although there are thirteen tower masters in the entire Wudao Tower, except for the No. 1 tower master, the No. 2 tower master and the No. 3 tower master, the other tower owners can only be regarded as deputy tower masters, and their status and strength are far inferior to the previous three tower masters.

These three tower masters are the real people in charge of the Wudao Tower, but usually the three tower masters will not appear, and they don't take care of things, they are all managed by the Lord of Time.

Ye Tian only knew that the Lord of Time was a super-perfect controller, and the Lord of the Ancient must have surpassed the super-perfect master, and Ye Tian didn't know what level it belonged to.

Soon, all those who were supposed to come came, one by one, sat cross-legged in the void.

Airplanes!

An incomparably terrifying figure, the person who came was a white-haired young man, but the aura on his body overwhelmed everyone, he was the Lord of the Ancients.

"I've seen the Lord of the Ancients!"

Many perfect controllers and half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Realm said respectfully.

Canggu nodded slightly, and immediately began to preach.

At the moment when the Lord of the Ancient Lord preached, the Tao he preached actually showed the power of the Extreme Dao, and all kinds of Extreme Dao power spread all over the void, and with the preaching of the Lord of the Ancients, it was easier for the Perfect Controller and the Half-step Perfect Master of the Extreme Realm to understand the power of the Extreme Dao.

"The Lord of the Ancient Ages actually demonstrated the power of the Extreme Dao through preaching, what kind of strength is this, his understanding of the Extreme Dao has reached a level that I can't imagine!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

Not only Ye Tian was shocked, but many Perfect Controllers and Half-Step Perfect Masters of the Extreme Creation Realm were also shocked, and it was also the first time they had listened to the Lord of Canggu's preaching.

"Listening to the Lord of Canggu this time, it's really an opportunity!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

So, he began to listen carefully to the sermon of the ancient lord, absorb the essence of the other party's sermon, and slowly understand the understanding, so as to turn it into his own understanding.

This sermon, the Lord of the Ancient Ages has been preaching for a long time, involving all kinds of sermons and all aspects.

At the beginning, the content of the Ancient Lord's sermon was still relatively shallow, but it soon became more and more profound, and many half-step perfect masters and perfect masters of the Extreme Creation Realm could not understand it.

It can be said that if you don't have a high enough perception of the power of the Extreme Dao, you can't understand it at all, just like listening to a wordless heavenly book.

But Ye Tian could barely understand.

Listening to the preaching of the Lord of the Ancients, Ye Tian had a new understanding of the use of the rudimentary power of the Extreme Dao, and it would be of great benefit to him in the future.

Suddenly, the Lord of the Ancient said again, "Many of you have not completely mastered the power of the Extreme Dao, not even the fur of the Extreme Dao. Of course, if you don't condense the super-perfect ancestor, you can't hope for the realm of the super-perfect master, but if you have the potential to become a super-perfect master, then you must master the power of the extreme path, and only by thoroughly mastering an extreme path can you step into the realm of the super-perfect master, which is the minimum requirement. "

"To become a super-perfect master, you must thoroughly master an extreme way!"

Ye Tianming came to his senses.

However, he didn't need to worry, after all, he was not too far away from completely mastering the Extreme Dao of the Sword, and he would definitely be able to master the Extreme Dao of the Sword 100% in the future.

Next, many Perfect Masters asked the Lord of the Ancient for advice, while others, even if they didn't, could learn more about the mysteries of cultivation through the Q&A.

Suddenly, a half-step perfection controller of the Extreme Creation Realm asked curiously: "Lord of the Ancients, may I ask what realm is above the super-perfect master, it seems that there is no record in the various classics of the Wudao Pagoda. "

"That realm is too far away!" the Lord of the Ancient said with a smile: "However, since you asked, this seat will also talk about it, above the super perfect controller is the perfect controller of the virtual realm, as for how to become the perfect controller of the virtual realm, then it is not what you should know at the moment!"

"Thank you Lord Canggu for your advice!"

The half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm responded.

Limfer!

Everyone else heard it, and they were all curious about the Void.

However, I also want to know that it is too difficult to become a perfect controller of the Void Realm, after all, for many half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm, becoming a super perfect controller is their permanent ultimate goal.

"Imaginary realm, I will definitely reach it!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Some more years passed, and the sermon of the Lord of the Ancients officially ended.

......

The Nine Rivers Void, the Void inside the Super Perfect Alien Sword Body.

Ye Tian was still here to meditate and practice, and at this moment, the effect of his contemplation had been greatly improved.

This was made possible by the preaching of the Lord of the Ancients.

"The power of the Extreme Path cannot be blindly attained, but requires mastery of a special way. "

Ye Tian remembered this.

And he changed his strategy, and when he was consulting the Extreme Way of the Sword, while participating in the Enlightenment, he practiced the use of the prototype of the Extreme Way of the Sword, and cooperated with the Extreme Way of the Sword.

In addition, you can create a variety of secret techniques that can assist in the ultimate path of the sword, so as to increase the effect of your own enlightenment.

And just like that, another ten million eternal years passed.

"There are only nine variations left!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

If the nine changes are combined, he will completely master the Extreme Dao of the Sword, and at that time, his strength will be greatly improved, and he will be at the level of invincible combat power among the medium perfect masters.

Of course, among the half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm, he would also be at the invincible level.

However, it is not easy to merge the nine changes into one, and in the future, it becomes more and more difficult to fuse, and it needs to be thoroughly understood.

Eight variations!

Seven variations!

Six variations!

Five variations!

......

It was getting closer and closer to completely mastering the Extreme Dao of the Sword, and Ye Tian was also extremely excited.

After all, many high-level perfect masters have not been able to master an extreme path in their lifetime, and he has not yet become a perfect master, just a half-step perfect master of the extreme realm, and he is about to master an extreme path, how can he not be excited?

More than 15.6 million eternal years had passed, and Ye Tian was finally about to completely fuse the sword path into a change and master the extreme way of the sword.

this day.

The remaining two changes of the sword path were completely fused, and the sword of the extreme path was condensed.

This moment.

Ye Tian's body underwent a huge change, and the power of the Sword Extreme Dao frantically transformed Ye Tian's controlled body.

And his strength is also increasing at an incredible rate.
